posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @wendy1

Welcome to the Community!

I’d recommend checking out this article as a starting point: Digital asset management on monday.com

Within the platform, you can head to the template centre by selecting to add a new board from a template.
Once in the centre, you can find templates specific for digital asset management:

image2498×1272 383 KB

I’d also recommend checking out our Cards View: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4405723870994-The-Cards-View
This view allows you to view all your important item details in one very visual, gallery-like display.
We find our users who are using the platform for asset management really like this view!

You can also learn more about our monday.com forms here: The Forms

I’d recommend starting with the resources above and trying out the templates as a starting point!
You can then customise the templates to your exact needs

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: MNCMetal (Cindy Therkildsen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this a viable option for tangible asset management as well?
